mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DISPOSAL_NOTICE (notice_id, disposal_id, notice_date, read_yn) VALUES (#{noticeId}, #{disposalId}, SYSDATE, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT f.foodMaterialName, fc.foodCategory, NVL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) AS disposalCountAll, f.foodMaterialType, f.expirationDate, d.disposal_Id FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC fc ON f.foodCategory_Id = fc.foodCategory_Id LEFT JOIN DISPOSALS d ON f.foodMaterial_Id = d.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE AND NVL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) > 0 ORDER BY f.expirationDate DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE DISPOSAL_NOTICE SET read_yn = 'Y' WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.disposal_Id FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM FOODM f LEFT JOIN DISPOSALS d ON f.foodMaterial_Id = d.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE AND NVL(d.disposalCountAll, 0) > 0
SELECT NVL(SUM(d.disposalCountAll),0) total FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialType = '고체' AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE
SELECT NVL(SUM(d.disposalCountAll),0) total FROM DISPOSALS d JOIN FOODM f ON d.foodMaterial_Id = f.foodMaterial_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} AND f.foodMaterialType = '액체' AND f.expirationDate < SYSDATE
SELECT NVL(MAX(TRUNC(SYSDATE - expirationDate)),0) AS max_day FROM FOODM WHERE bId = #{bId} AND expirationDate < SYSDATE
